title: AL's Spiders Revamped: Classic Legs
description: Classic legs Add-on for AL's Spiders Revamped
body:
![Classic Spider legs logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dccc28901350260177d496df3d1ea5b5db6cc0be.png)

# 

Do you not like the new, scary, jointed leg design in AL's Spiders Revamped but like everything else?

This pack reverts it to the simple, vanilla style, legs.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jSTOYt4Rt8s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

 

Important:

In order for this pack to work, you need to load it above Spiders Revamped.

Load them in order:

-This Pack

-AL's Spiders Revamped (or AL's Spiders Revamped x FA)
